# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 683. Abandoned Motor Vehicles
##### § 683.0711 — Municipal Requirements

An ordinance adopted by a governing body of a municipality may provide for a more inclusive definition of a junked vehicle subject to regulation under this subchapter.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1073, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: An ordinance adopted by a governing body of a municipality may provide for a more inclusive definition of a junked vehicle subject to regulation under this subchapter.
